revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) HYPOTHESIS FLIP at 01:19 — the reactive read on the roofing bridge miss must be marked primary, not co-equal with the strategic read. Stage 3 provides its own undermining evidence (no follow-up roofing thread for the remaining 8 minutes) and then fails to apply it. The strategic read should be demoted to a footnote, not a co-hypothesis. (2) ADD TWO MISSED MOMENTS as cherry_pick items: (a) the title_co_owners verify skip at ~00:29 (Meg confirms homeownership but never asks about co-owners, which means the button-up has no spouse-coordination spine), and (b) the interest_in_solar verify skip (the emotional anchor question is never asked across the entire call — this is distinct from the bill-anchor miss and should be surfaced separately with its own coaching implication). (3) FIX SCHEMA MISUSE in cherry_pick_moments[2]: the reference to verify.interest_in_solar for the hot-tub/EV probe is wrong. Correct to coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring or note there is no direct schema item for load-amplifier probing. (4) SOFTEN two tone items: replace 'deflected' with 'redirected' in handoff_brief.unresolved_concerns[2] (the move was schema-correct, not evasive), and revise the characterization that Meg 'pivots immediately to scheduling' after the bill receipt — she makes a brief tie-back first. No full rerun needed; these are targeted corrections to existing sections.
